headline: Centene (CNC) Stock May Still Be A Bargain After A 114% Run
summary: Centene stock has more than doubled over the past year, yet the valuation checks still lean on the cheap side. This raises a clear question about whether the recent share price strength has fully reflected the current fundamentals. Over the past 12 months, Centene has returned 114.2%, which puts recent enthusiasm for the stock squarely in focus for anyone thinking about valuation today. Contract wins in Medicaid managed care can support confidence in the durability of Centene’s cash flows...
